prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement dashboard JSON model versioning and migration: the dashboard version schema definitions, the DashboardMigrator, and the field-level migration functions that upgrade old dashboard JSON to the current schema version.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the grafana-observability fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in grafana/grafana that implement dashboard JSON model versioning and migration: the dashboard version schema definitions, the DashboardMigrator, and the field-level migration functions that upgrade old dashboard JSON to the current schema version.
